title: P4: Missing rxOneShot=false in one-shot RX_PACKET path in DispatchMessage
description: In SX1262.cs:664 only rxMode=false if(rxOneShot); should also clear rxOneShot=false for consistency with all other rxMode=false sites (Reset, SetTx, SetStandby, RX_TIMEOUT, error paths). Continuous RX (rxOneShot=false) unaffected. Tagged codereview. Discovered during review of project-LICHEN-59bp.
close_reason: Added rxOneShot=false in RX_PACKET oneShot path in DispatchMessage:663 for full consistency with all other clear sites. Updated inline comment. Verified under stateLock.
